phase-summary.outcome: Space Explorer now uses per-space feature vectors with a dedicated Define Feature modal. Behavior Lens was removed, Fame/Awareness/Guile were merged into space vectors, and movement controls now support assignable custom features.

file.description: Implemented space feature registry, modal-driven feature creation, per-space assignment controls, movement-vector assignment controls, and vectorized defaults for content plotting.
Added `44-09` plan entry for space-vector authoring controls.
Added task `44-09` with verification command references.

decision.summary: Feature-space authoring should happen at the space level, with optional shared features across spaces and movement vectors.
decision.impact: Improves clarity, supports experimentation, and keeps vector definitions explicit in the UI.

tests.test: `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` (fails due pre-existing `app/dungeonbreak-content-app/dungeon-explorer/page.tsx` issues outside this change).

next.action: Optional: persist space-feature assignments to content-pack patch payloads so authored spaces survive reload without manual re-entry.
